action.reasoning: Observation: Eval consistently fails with evaluator.py looking for '/data/test_labels.txt'. My predict.py runs successfully producing 18000 predictions. WavLM model has dev EER=0.0001. Analysis: The framework evaluator.py hardcodes '/data/test_labels.txt' but data is at '/rab_data/asvspoof2021_la_test/'. This is a persistent framework issue. However, I should keep submitting eval. Meanwhile, I should try to improve the model further. Decision: Submit eval again with WavLM checkpoint. Also train WavLM with more epochs and stronger codec augmentation to improve generalization to codec-degraded test audio. I'll also try an ensemble of both models in predict.py.
